001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Delete;
006import androidx.room.Insert;
007import androidx.room.Query;
008import androidx.room.Transaction;
009import androidx.room.Update;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil;
011import java.util.Collection;
012import java.util.List;
013
014/**
015 * Data Access Object interface for {@link CollectedFossil} entity. Provides methods for managing
016 * fossils collected by users, including filtering by favorites and tracking collection statistics.
017 */
018@Dao
019public interface CollectedFossilDao {
020
021  /**
022   * Inserts a new collected fossil into the database.
023   *
024   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to insert.
025   * @return Generated primary key ID.
026   */
027  @Insert
028  long insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil);
029
030  /**
031   * Updates an existing collected fossil record.
032   *
033   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to update.
034   * @return Number of rows updated (should be 1).
035   */
036  @Update
037  int update(CollectedFossil collectedFossil);
038
039  /**
040   * Updates multiple collected fossils in a batch operation.
041   *
042   * @param collectedFossils Collection of collected fossils to update.
043   * @return Number of rows updated.
044   */
045  @Update
046  int updateRange(Collection<CollectedFossil> collectedFossils);
047
048  /**
049   * Retrieves collected fossils by their primary key ID.
050   *
051   * @param id Collected fossil ID.
052   * @return List of collected fossils with the specified ID.
053   */
054  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collected_fossil_id = :id")
055  List<CollectedFossil> getCollectedFossilById(long id);
056
057  /**
058   * Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user.
059   *
060   * @param userId User ID.
061   * @return List of all collected fossils for the specified user.
062   */
063  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId")
064  List<CollectedFossil> getAllCollectedFossilsForUser(long userId);
065
066  /**
067   * Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user ordered by collection date (newest first)
068   * as observable live data.
069   *
070   * @param userId User ID.
071   * @return LiveData containing list of collected fossils ordered by date.
072   */
073  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId ORDER BY date_time_collected DESC")
074  LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllCollectedFossilsForUserOrderByDate(long userId);
075
076  /**
077   * Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status.
078   *
079   * @param userId User ID.
080   * @param isFavorite Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
081   * @return List of collected fossils matching the favorite status.
082   */
083  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId AND is_favorite = :isFavorite")
084  List<CollectedFossil> getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavorite(long userId, boolean isFavorite);
085
086  /**
087   * Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by
088   * collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
089   *
090   * @param userId User ID.
091   * @param isFavorite Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
092   * @return LiveData containing list of collected fossils matching the favorite status, ordered by
093   *     date.
094   */
095  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId AND is_favorite = :isFavorite ORDER BY date_time_collected DESC")
096  LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavoriteOrderByDate(long userId, boolean isFavorite);
097
098  /**
099   * Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats
100   * yet.
101   *
102   * @param userId User ID.
103   * @return List of collected fossils without fossil stats.
104   */
105  @Query("SELECT * FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId AND fossil_stats_id IS NULL")
106  List<CollectedFossil> getAllWithoutFossilForUser(long userId);
107
108  /**
109   * Retrieves the total count of collected fossils for a specific user.
110   *
111   * @param userId User ID.
112   * @return Total number of fossils collected by the user.
113   */
114  @Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collected_fossil WHERE collecting_user = :userId")
115  int getCollectedFossilCountByUser(long userId);
116
117  /**
118   * Deletes a collected fossil from the database.
119   *
120   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to delete.
121   * @return Number of rows deleted (should be 1).
122   */
123  @Delete
124  int delete(CollectedFossil collectedFossil);
125
126//  @Transaction
127//  @Query("SELECT * FROM CollectedFossilWithStats WHERE collected_fossil_id = :id")
128//  LiveData<CollectedFossilWithStats> getCollectedFossilWithStatsById(long id);
129
130}
131
132
